name: Grupo Pochteca, S.A.B. de C.V.
summary: Grupo Pochteca, S.A.B. de C.V. distributes industrial raw materials in Mexico. It offers raw materials, which include chemicals, such as generic, inorganic, and specialty chemicals for use in various industrial processes; ingredients and additives for the food industry; Shell lubricants for manufacturing sector; and solvents and solvents and blends comprising thinners, toluene, white gasoline, acetone, methanol, industrial alcohol, and other products. The company sells raw materials to manufacturers of baked goods, oil and gas, mining, manufacturing, marine, electric power, overland passenger and freight fleets, construction, aviation, automotive, agriculture, personal care, oilfield supply services, cleaning products, textiles, agro-chemicals, water treatment, electronics, adhesives, resins, paints, lacquers and varnishes, sauces and dressings, meat products, soups and pastas, dairy products, confectionery, and beverage industries. It also provides self-adhesive, cut board and board rolls, coated, digital, letter, legal, ledger, bond, printing and writing, and plotter paper products, as well as offers solvents and waxes for printing equipment, roll-converting services, and rigid plates for displays and POP. In addition, the company offers logistics and industrial waste management services. It sells paper products to printers, packaging, and publishing markets, as well as design firms, digital printing centers, and advertising agencies. Grupo Pochteca, S.A.B. de C.V. was founded in 1988 and is headquartered in Mexico City, Mexico.
